prerequisites.value: Appraise 1 rank, Diplomacy 1 rank, Knowledge (Local) 1 rank.

description.value: **Benefit:** By utilizing your black market connections, you acquire a resource pool worth 100 gp. This can only be used on illegal or illicit items or services (note that something may be illegal or illicit in one area but perfectly acceptable in another). Typical illegal or illicit items are drugs, poison s, evil magic items, slaves, or dead bodies, though intangibles such as secret information may also qualify (and for these items, a secret of equal valueâat the GMâs discretionâmust be contributed to the pool).
